testcase.name: test_stock_history

failure.message: assert (True and 0 >= 10) + where True = isinstance([], list) + and 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: tests/test_radar_screener.py:123: in test_stock_history assert isinstance(b["points"], list) and len(b["points"]) >= 10 E assert (True and 0 >= 10) E + where True = isinstance([], list) E + and 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_batch_quotes

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (None) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb9d18fd91c0>('price') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb9d18fd91c0> = {'symbol': 'AAPL', 'name': 'AAPL', 'price': None, 'change': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_radar_screener.py:143: in test_batch_quotes assert q.get("price") and q["price"] > 0 E AssertionError: assert (None) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb9d18fd91c0>('price') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb9d18fd91c0> = {'symbol': 'AAPL', 'name': 'AAPL', 'price': None, 'change': None, ...}.get
